backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the CampusVoice backend with complaint management (CRUD, status updates) and user profile endpoints, protected by role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features—logout fix and DeleteAccountDialog localStorage scoping—to their relevant frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, sidebar tokens, and chart palette.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the CampusVoice AI React app, mounting the app at `#root` and loading the Vite entry point `src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication state, profile setup modal, responsive sidebar/header layout, and view routing across all dashboard pages for different user roles.
frontend/src/components/AIChatbot.tsx: Floating AI chatbot widget with a scrollable message thread, text-to-speech support, and Gemini-powered responses via `getChatbotResponse`.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Sticky top navigation header with logo, mobile menu toggle, emergency alert dialog, notification bell with dropdown, and user profile/logout dropdown menu. Handles emergency alert creation and logout with React Query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx: Role-based sidebar navigation component that renders different nav items for student, staff, HOD, and admin roles, plus logout and delete account actions.
frontend/src/components/ComplaintCard.ts: Card component displaying a single complaint's status, priority, category, description, media attachments, and overdue indicator, with role-aware anonymous name handling and optional status update action.
frontend/src/components/DeleteAccountDia: Confirmation dialog that permanently deletes the user's account via mutation, clears profile-specific localStorage keys and React Query cache, then logs the user out.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyAlertOv: Full-screen overlay shown to HOD and admin roles when an active emergency alert exists, playing a siren and displaying student/location details with an acknowledge button.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackForm.tsx: Star-rating feedback form for resolved complaints that saves rating and optional comment to localStorage via localComplaintStore, with a read-only display mode for existing feedback.
frontend/src/components/MediaUploader.ts: A React component that allows users to upload photos, videos, and audio files, converting them to data URLs and displaying previews in a grid with remove functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for first-time users to set up their profile by entering name, email, campus role, and department, then saving via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/constants/appRoles.ts: Defines the CampusRole type and lookup records for role display labels and badge colors for student, staff, HOD, and admin roles.
frontend/src/constants/complaintCategori: Defines all complaint category constants grouped by domain (Academic, Infrastructure, etc.), sensitive category flags, and a list of college departments.
frontend/src/contexts/AppContext.tsx: Provides global app state including authentication status, user profile, notifications, and emergency alerts via React context, polling local storage every 5 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state through a React context provider and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles and complaints via the ICP actor, including get, create, update, and delete operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, CSS custom properties for a campus teal/navy theme (light and dark modes), and utility component classes for status/priority badges and sidebar nav items.
frontend/src/lib/audioService.ts: Provides Web Audio API utilities to play a confirmation beep, an emergency siren sound, and to stop all audio by closing the AudioContext.
frontend/src/lib/complaintHelpers.ts: Utility functions for complaints including generating unique IDs, calculating deadlines based on priority, formatting timestamps, and checking if a complaint is overdue.
frontend/src/lib/geminiService.ts: Wraps the Gemini API to provide AI-powered complaint text analysis, image analysis, and a campus-context chatbot response function.
frontend/src/lib/localComplaintStore.ts: localStorage-backed store for extended complaint metadata, emergency alerts, and notifications that supplement the ICP backend's core complaint data.
frontend/src/lib/reportGenerator.ts: Generates and triggers browser downloads of complaint reports in JSON or CSV format, including summary statistics and formatted complaint fields.
frontend/src/lib/userProfileHelpers.ts: Provides encode/decode helpers for storing extended user profile fields (campusRole, department) in the ICP backend's name field using a pipe-delimited format.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClient, InternetIdentity, and App providers.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyticsPage.tsx: Displays complaint analytics (category, status, priority charts) with role-based filtering, AI-powered predictive analysis via Gemini, and JSON export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ChatbotPage.tsx: Simple page wrapper that directs users to the floating AI chatbot widget for campus FAQ and complaint assistance.
frontend/src/pages/ComplaintsListPage.ts: Lists complaints with search/filter controls, role-based visibility (admin/HOD/staff/student), status update actions, and CSV export; supports viewing complaint details and submitting feedback.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Role-aware dashboard showing complaint statistics (total, registered, in-progress, resolved, high-priority) with quick-action navigation buttons tailored per user role.
frontend/src/pages/EmergencyLogsPage.tsx: Admin page for viewing, acknowledging, and clearing emergency alert logs stored locally, with confirmation dialog for bulk deletion.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page with a hero section, Internet Identity login button, and a feature highlights grid for the CampusVoice AI application.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitComplaintPage.t: A form page that allows users to submit complaints with description, category, priority, anonymous toggle, and media uploads, featuring AI-powered analysis via Gemini to auto-suggest category and priority.
frontend/src/pages/TrackComplaintsPage.t: Displays a filterable, searchable list of the current user's submitted complaints with status badges, detail dialog, feedback form, and CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/UserManagementPage.ts: A placeholder admin page for user management that explains users are authenticated via Internet Identity and managed through the decentralized ICP backend.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, an extended color palette (teal, navy, semantic tokens via OKLCH CSS variables), border radii, shadows, and animation keyframes with typography and container-query plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for CampusVoice tracking existing features, known bugs (broken sign-out, complaints deleted with account), and pending fix requests including preserving complaints after account deletion.
